title: My Service Canada Account: Sign in or register with your province - Canada.ca
content:
## Sign in or register with your province to access MSCA
You can access My Service Canada Account (MSCA) by signing in or registering with  your provincial  sign-in.

## MSCA eligibility criteria
To register for MSCA, you must:
- be at least 12 years old
- only access and use MSCA as yourself. No one is authorized to use or create an account on your behalf
This service is only available for residents of Alberta and British Columbia.
If you live outside of these provinces, you can register for MSCA with GCKey or with your bank .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
